Skills.Name: Axe
Skills.Description: Mastery of axes — heavy chopping arcs that carry through to the next foe.

Powers.Name: Cleave
Powers.Description: Axe-class hits have a chance to swing through to one adjacent enemy, dealing half damage.

Powers.Name: Expertise
Powers.Description: +2 to-hit while wielding an Axe-class weapon (Battleaxe / Hatchet).

Powers.Name: Berserk
Powers.Description: Active ability: enter a 5-turn blood frenzy — +5 Strength, -2 DV. 100-turn cooldown. Requires an Axe weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Dismember
Powers.Description: Axe hits have a small chance to dismember a non-vital body part (arm, leg, hand, foot, etc.) — the target loses the limb and starts bleeding. Mortal parts (head, heart) are safe from this passive; that's Decapitate's territory.
